name: Orlando Innovation Ecosystem
summary: Ten clusters diagnosed across the Orlando metropolitan region, spanning simulation and training, photonics, aerospace, cybersecurity, medtech, agtech, advanced manufacturing, digital media, space technology, and tourism technology.
